full_text:
Zong (Ziqing) 宗 (子卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zong (宗), styledZiqing (子卿), was born in Nanyang. Persuaded the rebelling Hou Yin to let the governor go, joined in attack on Hou Yin. Zong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
